rulings.Case Title: IRA SERVICES INC. VS. AMERICAN ZURICH INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Pltf To Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 12, 2011, line 2. DEFENDANT ZURICH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Produce Documents. Granted. Plaintiff has waived its privileges by placing the fee amount at issue in ths case. Defendant needs to know what tasks were performed to determine whether the claimed fees are reasonable. Late disclosure would violate discovery cutoff, delay the trial, and not provide defendant with an adequate opportunity to prepare its defense. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CAFE TIRAMISU LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WAH CHAI LIAN AKA ALBERT LIAN, AN INDIVIDUAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 12, 2011, line 8. DEFENDANT WAH CHAI LIAN AKA ALBERT LIAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to the 1st, 3rd, 4th and 6th causes of action. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 2nd cause of action for plaintiff to allege the fraud with greater specificity. Plaintiff's reference to important "facts" is vague and conclusory. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action for plaintiff to allege whether the agreement is oral. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: HONG SANG MARKET, INC. VS. VIVIEN PENG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 12, 2011, line 14. PLAINTIFF HONG SANG MARKET, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER. Granted. Plaintiff shifts the burden and defendant raises no triable issue of material fact. Defendant remained in possession of the premises with plaintiff's consent after the forfeiture of the master tenancy, and a new direct month-to-month tenancy between plaintiff and defendant was created with the notice and the payment of 2 months rent. Defendant's evidentiary objections are overruled. The court accepts the evidence merely for the facts stated and not for any legal opinions of conclusions that me be expressed. =(302/CWW)
